scenario_name: Scenario 12 — Pattern Matching with Existing Codebase
justification: All pass rubric criteria met: file paths follow .tmp/warehouses/warehouse-*.ts kebab-case pattern; WarehouseRepository is an interface; WarehouseService injects repository via constructor; AppError reused from shared/app-error (not a new error class); error code is WAREHOUSE_NOT_FOUND; updateCapacity calls repo.save; tests use mock repository via makeRepo factory; acceptance_criteria_coverage maps all 3 ACs with status implemented.

observations.text: Exact structural mirror of ProductService pattern — file paths, naming, DI, error handling all consistent
AppError created in shared/app-error.ts matching the import path ../shared/app-error expected by the pattern
Tests cover both happy and sad paths for all 3 ACs (5 tests total)
No deviations or escalations reported, and none detected from the output
Mock pattern uses makeRepo factory matching the injectable/mock pattern from existing codebase
